skills.name: midnightskill
skills.description: Root router skill for Midnight Network. Use this to select the right sub-skill.

skills.name: why-midnight
skills.description: What Midnight is, why it exists, and how it works — public/private state, selective disclosure, and ZK proofs.

skills.name: 1am-wallet
skills.description: Integrate 1AM wallet for dust-free contract deployment and transaction flow on Midnight Network.

skills.name: compact
skills.description: The Compact smart contract language for Midnight Network. TypeScript-like DSL that compiles to ZK circuits.

skills.name: testing
skills.description: Debug Compact contracts and manage toolchain versions. Static vs dynamic errors, version sync, common traps.

skills.name: multinetwork
skills.description: Build a single dApp that deploys across all networks (localnet, preview, preprod, mainnet) from one codebase.

skills.name: midnight-js
skills.description: TypeScript SDK — provider wiring, wallet SDK, contract deployment, DUST flow, testkit.

skills.name: midnight-indexer
skills.description: Query and subscribe to Midnight blockchain data via Indexer GraphQL API v4. Contract state, subscriptions, event watching.

skills.name: midnight-security
skills.description: Privacy audit checklist, data leak patterns, defensive Compact patterns, commitment/nullifier design.

skills.name: example-counter
skills.description: Complete Midnight DApp reference — headless wallet, CLI, counter contract, DUST generation, deploy, interaction.

skills.name: nft
skills.description: Build shielded and unshielded NFTs on Midnight using OpenZeppelin Compact contracts and native token functions.

skills.name: token-transfers
skills.description: Shielded and unshielded token transfers, balance queries, multi-party flows on Midnight.

skills.name: hello-world
skills.description: Build a complete Midnight Network hello-world DApp from scratch using Compact smart contract, headless Node.js tests with vitest, and testkit-js FluentWalletBuilder.
